update_note: P1 mapping expansion: added 9 products with confirmed bed types and price tier 597. Excluded: 亲子房(5), 钟点房(2), 豪华套房(1), 未确认(3). See rationales in each group.
notes: This mapping is intentionally conservative and only includes the most plausible ebooking products for the three public room groups currently produced by the pricing engine.
Unmapped ebooking products should not be auto-modified until a stronger cross-channel room mapping is confirmed.
reference_ebooking_sale_prices are baseline prices used to keep recommendation_to_execution_plan idempotent after a previous execution.

groups.rationale: Added: 尊享套房(1564324967) and 超大床房(1564329233) - both bed-type products at 597 tier, consistent with public listing 挂牌价 597.
Expanded with 4 浴缸大床 products at 597 tier (same as listing 挂牌价). All are bed-type with bath amenities, consistent with 1张1.8米大床 category.
Added 悠然标间(1564330620) and 雅致双床房(1564981591) - both twin/标准间 type at 597 tier, matching 2张1.5米双人床 category.
